description: A dark graphic containing a block of white text presenting a statement that criticizes the arrest of a Milwaukee legal resident by ICE, calling it inexcusable and describing the action in critical terms. The statement is attributed at the bottom to LT. GOVERNOR MANDELA BARNES. The graphic is plain text on a dark background with no photograph.
notable_text: The arrest of Salah Sarsour is inexcusable; LT. GOVERNOR MANDELA BARNES
